bullets: • Data science is not dying, but rather evolving, and it's not as difficult to get a data science job as it feels, especially for junior or entry-level roles.
• The data scientist job title has become fragmented due to companies becoming more stringent and strict on the exact responsibilities and roles of certain data professions.
• There are three main types of data scientists: data analysts, machine learning engineers, and data engineers, each with different focuses and requirements.

• Data analysts focus on the business side, experimentation, and analysis to improve business outcomes, while machine learning engineers focus on building and deploying solutions, and data engineers focus on building infrastructure and pipelines for data storage and access.
• To succeed in the data science field, it's recommended to start with a data analyst role, gain experience, and then transition into other roles such as machine learning engineer or data engineer.
raw:
• Data science is not dying, but rather evolving, and it's not as difficult to get a data science job as it feels, especially for junior or entry-level roles.
• The data scientist job title has become fragmented due to companies becoming more stringent and strict on the exact responsibilities and roles of certain data professions.
• There are three main types of data scientists: data analysts, machine learning engineers, and data engineers, each with different focuses and requirements.
• Data analysts focus on the business side, experimentation, and analysis to improve business outcomes, while machine learning engineers focus on building and deploying solutions, and data engineers focus on building infrastructure and pipelines for data storage and access.
• To succeed in the data science field, it's recommended to start with a data analyst role, gain experience, and then transition into other roles such as machine learning engineer or data engineer.
